parents.subject: LU-19797 kfilnd: use mempool for allocation inside kfilnd

commit.subject: LU-19834 tests: disable conf-sanity/162 on a local setup
commit.message:
LU-19834 tests: disable conf-sanity/162 on a local setup

not supposed to run with MDT/OST/client on a single node.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Fixes: 666ead3301 ("LU-19746 mgs: disable connections with noclient option")
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ib9475c93b2f5ae36b4b2325254761b28126e1bd5
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/63619
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Alexander Boyko <alexander.boyko@hpe.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
